message:
Anthropic streaming: fix ID, model, raw, cache tokens, web search blocks

Fixes D-14: streaming captures all usage fields (including cache tokens)
from message_start, not just InputTokens.
Fixes D-15: streaming sets Response.ID from message_start message.id.
Fixes D-16: streaming sets Response.Raw from message_start message object.
Fixes D-17: streaming handles server_tool_use and web_search_tool_result
content blocks, emitting ContentWebSearch parts.
Fixes D-18: streaming uses actual model from message_start, not the
requested model.

Also fixes parseUsage to handle json.Number from UseNumber() decoder.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
